steps.title: Restrict the sample space
steps.content: The phrase given that the T-shirt is a Flames T-shirt means only Flames T-shirts count in the denominator. Among those Flames T-shirts, count the ones that are medium.

steps.title: Calculate the conditional probability
steps.content:
The table shows $22$ medium Flames T-shirts out of $44$ total Flames T-shirts:
$$P(\text{medium}\mid \text{Flames})=\frac{22}{44}=\frac{1}{2}=0.5$$The answer is D.
